$surface: In-app help drawer beside /login + marketing-site teaser
$voiceCadence: calm, reassuring, brisk — returning user refresher, not a pitch
$revisionNote: v1 was typography-only. v2 embeds real /login captures from sandbox via the new 'screenshot' sceneType.

storyboard.voiceover: Welcome back. Here's where you sign in.
This is your /login screen. Same view, every time you return.

storyboard.onScreenText: Email — the address you signed up with.
storyboard.voiceover: Email — the address you signed up with.

storyboard.onScreenText: Password — tap the eye to reveal.
storyboard.voiceover: Password. Tap the eye if you need to check it.

data.caption: Forgotten? One click below resets by email.

storyboard.voiceover: Or sign in with Google — one tap if your work account is linked.

data.caption: Continue with Google — one tap, no password.

storyboard.voiceover: RestoreAssist. One National Inspection Standard. Not activated yet? Run slash setup first.
